name: Hollywood Gold & Silver Exchange
description_short: Online precious metals dealer specializing in bullion coins and bars (gold, silver, platinum, palladium) with physical retail location in Hollywood. Offers buying, selling, jewelry repair, and appraisal services.
description_long:
Hollywood Gold & Silver Exchange is a precious metals dealer operating both online and at a physical location in Hollywood, California. The company positions itself as an authorized dealer of physical bullion products, working directly with mints and distributors to source inventory. Their business model centers on retail sales of investment-grade precious metals rather than traditional pawn lending, though they do accept jewelry and metals for purchase.

The company's primary offerings include bullion coins (American Gold Eagles, Canadian Maple Leafs, Austrian Philharmonics, Silver Eagles, etc.), bullion bars, numismatic/rare coins, and jewelry. Beyond sales, they provide buy-back services for precious metals and jewelry, jewelry repair and cleaning, third-party appraisals, and custom order fulfillment. Their online storefront displays real-time spot prices for gold, silver, platinum, and palladium. They emphasize direct-to-customer shipping and offer free shipping on orders exceeding $1,000.

What distinguishes this operation is their focus on quality control through direct mint relationships and their multi-channel customer support (phone, live chat, email). They educate customers on the difference between bullion coins (value based on metal content) and numismatic coins (value based on rarity). The company operates retail hours Monday-Friday 10am-6pm and Saturday 10am-5pm, suggesting a brick-and-mortar presence despite their online emphasis.

The honest assessment: While presented as an investment-focused precious metals dealer, this is fundamentally a retail buying/selling operation dependent on volatile commodity markets. Customers should recognize that precious metals carry market risk, and online precious metals purchases from any dealer require trust in shipping security and authenticity. No independent third-party reviews or ratings are provided on their website to verify claims about product quality or customer service reliability.
pros: Offers free shipping on orders over $1,000, reducing transaction costs for larger purchases
Real-time spot price display for gold, silver, platinum, and palladium on homepage
Multiple customer support channels (phone 323-645-7828, live chat, email) with stated commitment to prompt responses
Sells directly to consumer without intermediaries, potentially offering competitive pricing vs. secondary markets
Provides both bullion (investment-grade) and numismatic (rare collector) coins, serving different customer needs
Offers jewelry repair, cleaning, and appraisal services beyond basic buying/selling
Educates customers on coin classifications (BU grading, bullion vs. numismatic distinctions)
cons: No independent customer reviews, ratings, or third-party verification visible on website to validate service claims
Precious metals prices fluctuate daily based on market conditions; customers face full commodity market risk
Free shipping threshold of $1,000 may be prohibitively high for small investors or first-time buyers
Website privacy policy mentioned but actual content not provided, limiting transparency on data handling
No clear return policy, shipping insurance details, or authentication guarantees documented on website
best_for: Investors seeking to purchase bullion coins and bars for portfolio diversification or inflation hedging
Collectors of numismatic/rare coins with authentication and pricing confidence in established dealer
Individuals looking to sell existing precious metals, jewelry, or coins for cash
diagnosis: Hollywood Gold & Silver Exchange is best suited for existing precious metals investors or collectors seeking competitive online bullion purchasing with multi-channel support and jewelry services. The primary caveat is that precious metals investing carries commodity market risk, and buyers should independently verify the dealer's authenticity claims and shipping security practices before committing significant capital, as the website provides no third-party reviews or detailed transaction protections.
services: Buy precious metals online (gold, silver, platinum, palladium coins and bars)
Sell precious metals and jewelry to the company
Bullion coin sales (US Mint, Canadian, Austrian, Australian, etc.)
